display.description: This activity searches a vector store for relevant information based on a query

display.name: API Endopoint URL
display.description: Endpoint URL for the OpenAI API, for example https://api.openai.com/v1

display.name: OpenAI API Key
display.description: OpenAI key that is required to authenticate with the OpenAI API

display.name: Vector Store ID
display.description: If populated will add the file to the vector store

display.name: Max Number of Results
display.description: The maximum number of results to return from the vector search

display.name: Rewrite Query
display.description: Whether to rewrite the natural language query for vector search.
